summary: #59920 remains the canonical non-security path, but it is not merge-ready: current main still lacks the terminal-field JSONL parser behavior, while the PR has unknown mergeability and unresolved/unclean review proof. Planned repair is to update the existing contributor branch, route linked security-sensitive #25592 to central security triage, and keep already-closed #66819 and #69363 as historical related context only.

actions.reason: The linked channel-leak issue carries explicit security-review signals, so route only #25592 to central OpenClaw security handling.
Canonical PR is useful but not merge-ready; repair the contributor branch, resolve/prove the bot finding, rerun /review, and validate before merge.
Build an executable repair artifact instead of recommending merge from the current PR state.
Already-closed merged related parser fix; no closure or merge action is valid.
Closed unmerged related parser/session-state work; preserve as historical context and do not mutate.
